mapper.sql: np_event_cd , np_biz_nm , np_receiver_user_type , np_title_tpl , np_body_tpl , np_link_tpl , np_use_yn , TO_CHAR(np_reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS np_reg_dt

WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(np_event_cd) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR np_biz_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND np_use_yn = #{useYn}
AND np_receiver_user_type LIKE '%' || #{receiverType} || '%'
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM noti_policy
ORDER BY np_reg_dt DESC, np_event_cd ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
